de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.AbstractService
      • recoder.io.DefaultSourceFileRepository
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PropertyChangeListener, EventListener, SourceFileRepository, Service, ChangeHistoryListener

    public class KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository
extends DefaultSourceFileRepository
    This class is used to handle source files within recoder. It does only overwrite one method: createDataLocation. The original method in DefaultSourceFileRepository creates references to possibly non-existing files which we do not want. Thus, we leave the location already present.
    Author:
    MU

      • Fields inherited from class recoder.io.DefaultSourceFileRepository

    • Constructor Detail

      • KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository

        public KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository(ServiceConfiguration config)

    • Method Detail

      • createDataLocation

        protected DataLocation createDataLocation(CompilationUnit cu)
        return the data location that is already stored in the compilation unit. If there is no location stored so far, create a temporary invalid one. The super class would have created a location that does not represent the existing sources.
        Overrides:
        createDataLocation in class DefaultSourceFileRepository
        Parameters:
        cu - Compilation unit to create the location for.
        Returns:
        location(cu) == null ? SpecDataLocation.UNKNOWN_LOCATION : location(cu)
